steps.title: Find the decay factor
steps.content: A $25\%$ decrease means each $4$-second interval keeps $75\%$ of the previous points. As a decimal, the multiplier is $0.75$.

steps.title: Count the intervals
steps.content: Since $x$ is measured in seconds and each interval is $4$ seconds, the number of intervals is $$ \frac{x}{4} $$ Starting from $640$ points, the model is $$ f(x)=640(0.75)^{\frac{x}{4}} $$ The answer is A.
